scenario_results.reason: The lane resolved a standard freeze and benefit-status request only when the agreement, payment authorization, booking history, and credit ledger aligned.
Missing member, location, agreement, and service-category prerequisites produced a blocked-state response instead of speculative membership servicing.
Unsupported VIP cancellation and credit exceptions were treated as approval-bound escalations and not executed in-lane.
A membership conversation that turned into treatment-suitability guidance was handed to the correct licensed or clinical owner.
Repeat autopay and missing-credit failures triggered an escalation package instead of another generic front-desk answer.
Chargeback and practitioner-scope adjudication requests were routed to specialized adjacent owners rather than over-resolved by the membership lane.
The lane rejected generic subscription framing and re-established wellness-specific agreement, waiver, booking, and service-credit evidence requirements.
Conflicting public cancellation rights and tenant policy triggered escalation rather than false-confidence synthesis.
Unsupported transfer and shared-benefit workarounds were rejected cleanly and treated as boundary-sensitive policy issues.
Tenant-specific intake, waiver, and hybrid-system gates were applied as stricter overlays without losing the public baseline.

The in-scope scenario preserved wellness terminology such as EFT authorization, class pack, service credits, guest history record, waitlist, and esthetician room instead of collapsing into generic support wording.
Missing jurisdiction, waiver, screening, and contradictory restriction evidence triggered low-confidence escalation instead of confident synthesis.

notes: All 12 defined scenarios are represented in functionality_map.json scenario_coverage.
All required abilities are mapped and validated.
All 12 scenarios passed against the standard 0.92 threshold with complete ability coverage for the service-support-and-resolution and cross-industry contract.
The package stays inside wellness-membership administration and does not claim legal interpretation, pricing override, chargeback adjudication, practitioner-scope, or clinical decision authority.
